name: libobject-pad-perl
title: libobject-pad-perl
summary: module providing a simple syntax for lexical field-based objects
description:
module providing a simple syntax for lexical field-based objects
Object::Pad provides a simple syntax for creating object classes, which uses
private variables that look like lexicals as object member fields.
.
Classes are automatically provided with a constructor method, called new,
which helps create the object instances. This may respond to passed
arguments, automatically assigning values of fields, and invoking other
blocks of code provided by the class.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libobject-pad-perl because module providing a simple syntax for lexical field-based objects.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libobject-pad-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libobject-pad-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libobject-pad-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
